goal.text: Only revert the three low-value compiled skills in the locally installed Codex superpowers plugin to plain markdown skills, without changing the other installed superpowers skills or claw-kit itself.

requirements.summary: The user wants the local installed Codex superpowers plugin adjusted in place. Only `using-superpowers`, `writing-plans`, and `writing-skills` should be reverted from claw template-backed packages to plain markdown skills. Other installed superpowers skills should remain compiled. Repo-internal claw-kit skill packages are out of scope.
acceptanceCriteria: The three target skills in `C:\Users\chany\.codex\plugins\cache\openai-curated\superpowers\d6169bef\skills` no longer present themselves as claw template-backed entries.
Each reverted skill keeps a valid plain markdown `SKILL.md` matching the original superpowers fallback content.
Template-only support files and directories are removed from those three skill folders when they are no longer needed.
The other installed superpowers skills remain untouched.
A final filesystem check confirms the post-revert structure of all three target skill folders.

rules: Operate only on the installed local Codex superpowers plugin under `C:\Users\chany\.codex\plugins\cache\openai-curated\superpowers\d6169bef\skills`.
Do not change claw-kit plugin files or reintroduce repo-local superpowers copies.

references.why: Installed target skill folder to revert in place.
